events.title: Unveiling Guidance: A Practical Guide to Living Islam
events.description: Step into a transformative journey with our upcoming community class on Imam al-Ghazali’s The Beginning of Guidance.More than just theory, this class brings faith into your everyday life helping you understand how worship, character, and self-discipline shape not only your actions, but your inner state as a believer.Whether you’re seeking to deepen your connection with Allah, refine your character, or build consistency in your worship, this class offers practical, timeless guidance rooted in one of Islam’s most cherished works.RSVP HereWhen:  Thursdays |  at 8:00 PM (After Maghrib)Where: MCA Khadijah Banquet Hall

events.title: MCA Summer Camp 2026
events.description: Join us for 9 weeks of fun, learning, and community! Our weekday camp is led by experienced teachers and youth mentors, offering a balanced mix of outdoor activities, Islamic learning, arts & crafts, and more.Flexible weekly sign-ups availableDiscounts for 4 weeks, 5 weeks, or all 9 weeksDaily snacks provided (parents pack lunch)From sports and storytelling to Surah learning and Dhuhr prayer, your child will enjoy a meaningful and engaging summer, inshaAllah.Children must be potty trained and able to use the bathroom independently. Age groups require a minimum number of participants; otherwise, ages 8+ may be combined.For financial aid inquiries: youth@mcabayarea.orgRegister HereWhen: Mon- Fri | June 8 – August 6 | 10 am - 3 pmWhere: MCA Youth Lounge

events.title: Free Food Distribution (Sign-Up Required) via Support Life Foundation
events.description: To receive food distributions or volunteer visit - https://supportlives.org/get-yana/

events.title: The Sacred Contract: Fiqh of Public & Penal Law
events.description: How does a society protect its most vulnerable? From the sanctity of blood to the weight of an oath in court, we dive into the Prophetic narrations that built the world’s most enduring legal system. Discover the "why" behind the rulings that govern communal peace, judicial integrity, and the protection of rights.When: Starting Jan 24th  Every Saturday | 10:00 AM - 11:40 AMWhere:  MCA Prayer HallREGISTER HERE

events.title: Story & Play Time
events.description: The MCA Bookstore, in collaboration with the Women’s Committee, is excited to bring families together every week! Our Story Times are designed to spark a love of reading, strengthen Islamic values, and enrich children’s understanding of their deen in a fun, age-appropriate way. Through stories, songs, and activities, kids develop language, social, and early learning skills.Registration Required

events.title: Sisters Tafsir Class
events.description: Join our weekly tafsir class with AlHuda instructor Sr. Lubna Afzal to study the opening chapters of the Quran. Students will embark on a translation, word-by-word analysis and tafsir that will foster a greater understanding and love for the surahs. Great for busy sisters and beginners!    This weekly tafsir class that will cover translation, word-by-word analysis and tafsir of Surah Fatiha and Surah Baqarah.

events.title: Sisters Beginners Tajweed Class  (Online Only)
events.description: Start your tajweed journey from the basics. Learn essential rules and practice recitation in a beginner-friendly, supportive environment with Dr. Mona Ibrahim.Instructor:Dr. Mona IbrahimWhen: Every Saturday | 1:00–3:00 PMWhere: Online Register Here

events.title: Sisters Social
events.description: Revert sisters as well as those interested in Islam are invited to our July social about navigating loss and hardships as a new Muslim. We will reflect on finding strength, patience, and hope through faith while connecting with sisters in a warm and supportive space.Feel free to bring a dish to share.When: Sat, July 25 | 2:00 PM - 4:30 PMWhere: MCA Youth LoungeRSVP Here

events.title: The Kids’ Tafsir Reading Club
events.description: The Kids' Tafsir Reading Club is open to children ages 7-10, and will meet every other week, on Sundays from 10:30 AM-11:30 AM. We will be using "The Clear Quran-- Tafsir For Kids (Surahs 1-9)" as the primary text. Each session will focus on reading sections from The Clear Quran (Tafsir for Kids), followed by a group discussion, journaling of personal take-aways and learnings, and activities that reinforce the themes and lessons from the reading.    Every other Sunday 10:30AM-11:30AM, starting March 2nd

events.title: Introductory Qur’an Reading Class (For Sisters Only)
events.description: This beginner-friendly class is open to sisters with no prior knowledge of Arabic. It aims to help you learn to read the Qur’an correctly in Arabic through step-by-step instruction and guided practice.Instructor: Sr. Lamia AmmarWhen: Every Sunday, Starting June 7 |  12:00 PM – 1:30 PMWhere: MCA Youth LoungeRegister

events.title: STEM Summer Camps for Teens
events.description: Ready to build, code, and innovate this summer? STEM Summer Camp is HERE for ages 12-17!Join us for an exciting hands-on STEM experience where students dive into microcontrollers, AI in engineering, and electronicsSpots are limited and projects are hands-on + team-based—secure your spot early!When: Monday–Thursday | 9:30 AM – 3:30 PMSession 1: June 8 – July 3Session 2: July 6 – July 31 Where: MCA Aisha HallRegister

events.title: MCA Youth x My ‘Ilm Summer Math Tutoring Program
events.description: The goal is to help students strengthen their skills and prepare for the upcoming school year! Instruction will be organized by grade level, with each grade assigned its own week of classes. For example, students entering 7th grade will attend during one designated week. A detailed schedule will be shared soon.When: Mondays and Thursdays | July 13-30 | 10:00 AM-12:00 PMWhere: Maryam Hall and Fatimah HallRegister Here

events.title: Brothers Tajweed Class at MCA
events.description: The MCA Dawah & Outreach Committee is excited to present a Beginner’s Tajweed Class for Brothers, offering a foundational understanding of Tajweed rules to improve Quranic recitation.    This class, taught by Ustadh Saleh, is perfect for those who are new to Tajweed or want to refine their pronunciation. It provides an excellent opportunity to build confidence in reciting the Quran with accuracy and deepen your connection with the words of Allah.    🗓 When: Every Monday  ⏰ Time: After Maghrib 6pm-7pm  📍 Where: MCA Men’s Prayer Hall, 3003 Scott Blvd, Santa Clara, CA 95054    Whether you're just starting or looking to improve, this course is a welcoming space to grow your skills and understanding of the Quran.    For more details, contact us at dawah@mcabayarea.org.

events.title: Deen Charger
events.description: Join us Charge your Kids Deen with Fun.Register HERE

events.title: Level Up Deen: Youth Summer Program
events.description: Join us this summer for Level Up Deen: A Summer Faith & Nourishment Program with Sheikh Imran Vaid as we strengthen our connection with the Qur'an and grow in our understanding of Islam together! This 12-week series is designed to help youth strengthen and retain their Qur'an memorization while building a strong foundation in Islamic knowledge and character, inshaAllahProgram Includes:Qur'an memorization, translation, & tafseer of Juz 'Amma (Surahs 91–114)Practical lessons from the 40 Hadith of Imam NawawiInteractive Q&A on faith, identity, and everyday lifeWho: Open to brothers and sisters | Registration requiredWhen:  Tuesdays & Thursdays, June 16–August 25 | 7:00–8:00 PMWhere: MCA Men’s Prayer Hall & Youth LoungeRSVP Here

events.title: Tajweed for Brothers at Masjid Al-Noor
events.description: Masjid Al-Noor invites brothers to a Beginner’s Tajweed Class designed to teach the foundational rules of Tajweed and help you enhance your Quranic recitation. Led by Ustadh Saleh, this weekly course provides a supportive environment for beginners to develop confidence and precision in their recitation.    🗓 Schedule: Every Wednesday  ⏰ Time: 6:00 PM - 7:00 PM  📍 Venue: Masjid Al-Noor, 1755 Catherine St., Santa Clara, CA 95050    This class is ideal for those new to Tajweed or seeking to strengthen their understanding of proper Quranic pronunciation. Come and deepen your connection with the words of Allah in a welcoming and encouraging space.    For inquiries, contact us at dawah@mcabayarea.org.

events.description: A New Muslims’ GuideNew Muslims, as well as those interested in learning about Islam, are invited to join this weekly class. Don't forget to RSVPWhen: Every Thursday 6:30 PMWhere: MCA Youth Lounge

events.title: MCA Youth Leadership & Communication Workshop
events.description: Build confidence, sharpen your speaking skills, and grow as a leader this summer!  Join us for an exciting, hands-on program designed to help youth to overcome shyness, build confidence and develop communications skills and leadership qualities under Toastmasters International guidance.  Don’t miss out!Program details:Handbook, 6 sessions and 2 prep SessionsFinal presentation and family  dinner in KBHFinancial aid is available for this program, contact us at youth@mcabayarea.org When: Saturdays | August 01 – September 19 | 3–5 PM Where: MCA Youth LoungeRegister Here
